display.name: Village Request
display.short_description: A yolcu asks for help: a köylü in a küçük mezra needs a strong hand after a harap kulübe raid by an avcı.

rules.briefing_text: A köylü at the harap kulübe by the small path marks a hunter. Track the avcı, end the trouble, and return for a help reward.
rules.accepted_text: The avcı mark is lit on the trail. Kill the marked threat, then come back for your next step.
rules.completed_text: The avcı is down. Choose one aid reward, then return to the village and report back.
rules.claimed_text: This request post is quiet now; only torn nails and cold ash remain by the harap kulübe.
